name: Pressure Cooking Chart for Dried Fruit
recipeIngredient: Do not fill unit over 1/2 full
Soak per package directions before cooking
recipeInstructions:
1. Follow fruit item with the amount of liquid needed and then the minutes to cook at high pressure.
- Apples: 2 cups liquid, 2 minutes
- Apricots: 2 cups liquid, 2 minutes
- Figs: 2 cups liquid, 6 minutes
- Peaches: 2 cups liquid, 4 minutes
- Pears: 2 cups liquid, 4 minutes
- Prunes: 2 cups liquid, 5 to 6 minutes
- Raisins: 1 cup liquid, 5 minutes
